pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which explicitly creates category 005 with the name 'Computer programming, programs & data'. The expected string segment matches perfectly.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh shows category 004 is created as 'Data processing & computer science' and acts as an empty leaf node with no items inserted into the library_items table.
Execution of a python script parsing the hr_schema.sql employee inserts confirms the maximum manager hierarchy depth is 4 (e.g., King -> De Haan -> Hunold -> Ernst).
Directly matches the output path requested in the task instructions and expected by the verifier.
Directly matches the output path requested in the task instructions and expected by the verifier.

privileged_info_summary: The data is fully synthetic. Category 005 represents 'Computer programming, programs & data', while category 004 is an empty leaf with zero library items. The standard HR employees schema has a maximum management depth of 4 levels (starting from Steven King). The expected output paths are /home/ga/Desktop/hierarchy_queries.sql and /home/ga/Desktop/hierarchy_output.txt.
